message:
feat(golden): visual cell diff on checksum mismatch (bd-3jlw5.2)

Enhances golden checksum verification with visual cell-level diagnostics:
- On mismatch, re-renders the screen twice to detect non-determinism
- Shows cell coordinates, content, fg/bg for each differing cell (up to 20)
- Reports total changed cell count for quick triage
- Deterministic test also uses visual diff for diagnosing flaky renders

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
